raw_text.question: In a rhombus, find the length of a side if the diagonals are 30 and 40.
raw_text.response: Okay, in a rhombus, find the length of a side if the diagonals are 30 and 40. If one diagonal is 30 then half of the diagonal will be 15 and if the other diagonal is 40 then half of that diagonal will be 20 and the side will be the root of half diagonal 1 square plus half diagonal 2 square which should be the root of 15 square 225 and 20 square 400 So that will be the square root of 625 which should be 25. So the answer is 25 which is the length of the side.
